title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-10520 Exploited Ivanti Sentry Gateways Compromised Shortly After Patch

description: |

references:

author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/11
modified: 2026/06/11
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-10520 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-11T19:17:11Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-10520", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-10520 Exploitation Attempt - KEV_EXPLOIT"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:5369611; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-11, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.description: Shenzhen Tenda Technology Co., Ltd Tenda W20E v15.11.0.6 was discovered to contain a buffer overflow in the wewifiWhiteUserInfo parameter of the formAddWewifiWhiteUser function. This vulnerability allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted HTTP request.
items.apex_ai_summary: [HIGH] CVE advisory. Risk score 7.5/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

apex.ai_summary: [P1] CVE / Vulnerability - high severity (Risk 7.5/10). No MITRE ATT&CK techniques mapped - limited adversarial context. 1 indicator detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. AI confidence: LOW (22%) - limited source data available.
apex.recommended_action: CRITICAL PRIORITY - Patch within 24-48 hours. Activate IR playbook. Notify SOC lead and CISO.

ioc_paywall.message: 1 IOC(s) at 7.0% confidence - unlock with Pro tier.

items.nvd_disclosure: This CVE ID was not found in the NIST NVD database at time of enrichment. Intelligence is preliminary and unverified by NVD. CVSS score and severity are analyst-estimated until NVD confirmation.
items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-36818 Shenzhen Tenda Technology Co Ltd Tenda W20E v151106 was discovere
id: 44a002d5-64a5-57f3-b3ee-297a7fea1b51
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-36818 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-36818
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/11
modified: 2026/06/11
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-36818 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-11T19:17:11Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-36818", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-36818 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:9589353; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-11, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.
